name: Refrigerador French Door 450L
shortDescription: Capacidad amplia, dispensador de agua y control digital de temperatura.
description: Refrigerador French Door con acabado en acero inoxidable, sistema No Frost y compartimentos modulares para máxima organización. Ideal para familias que buscan eficiencia energética y diseño contemporáneo.

en.name: French Door Refrigerator 450L
en.shortDescription: Spacious capacity, water dispenser, and digital temperature control.
en.description: French Door refrigerator with stainless steel finish, No Frost system, and modular compartments for maximum organization. Ideal for families seeking energy efficiency and contemporary design.

name: Refrigerador Top Mount 320L
shortDescription: Diseño clásico con excelente relación espacio-consumo.
description: Refrigerador Top Mount compacto con bandejas ajustables, iluminación LED y control mecánico confiable. Perfecto para espacios medianos.

en.name: Top Mount Refrigerator 320L
en.shortDescription: Classic design with an excellent space-to-consumption ratio.
en.description: Compact Top Mount refrigerator with adjustable shelves, LED lighting, and reliable mechanical control. Perfect for medium-sized spaces.

name: Extractor de Pared 90 cm
shortDescription: Alta succión con filtros lavables y luz LED integrada.
description: Campana extractora de pared de 90 cm con tres velocidades, panel táctil y filtros de aluminio reutilizables. Reduce humo y olores con operación silenciosa.

en.name: Wall-Mounted Range Hood 90 cm
en.shortDescription: High suction with washable filters and integrated LED light.
en.description: 90 cm wall-mounted range hood with three speeds, touch panel, and reusable aluminum filters. Reduces smoke and odors with quiet operation.

name: Horno Eléctrico 60 cm Inverter
shortDescription: Cocción uniforme con tecnología Inverter y limpieza pirolítica.
description: Horno empotrable de 60 cm con tecnología Inverter para precisión térmica, múltiples funciones de cocción y puerta de triple vidrio. Incluye bandejas antiadherentes.

en.name: 60 cm Inverter Electric Oven
en.shortDescription: Even cooking with Inverter technology and pyrolytic self-cleaning.
en.description: 60 cm built-in oven with Inverter technology for thermal precision, multiple cooking functions, and triple-glazed door. Includes non-stick baking trays.

name: Vinera 28 Botellas
shortDescription: Control de temperatura dual zone para vinos tintos y blancos.
description: Vinera independiente con capacidad para 28 botellas, puerta de vidrio templado y estantes de madera. Mantiene humedad y temperatura estables.

en.name: 28-Bottle Wine Cooler
en.shortDescription: Dual-zone temperature control for red and white wines.
en.description: Freestanding wine cooler with capacity for 28 bottles, tempered glass door, and wooden shelves. Maintains stable humidity and temperature.

name: Estufa 5 Quemadores Acero
shortDescription: Quemadores sellados y horno con convección.
description: Estufa a gas de 76 cm con cinco quemadores de alta eficiencia, parrillas en hierro fundido y horno con ventilador de convección.

en.name: 5-Burner Stainless Steel Range
en.description: 76 cm gas range with five high-efficiency burners, cast iron grates, and oven with convection fan.

name: Calentador de Tanque 50L
description: Calentador de agua de almacenamiento de 50 litros con ánodo de magnesio y válvula de seguridad. Compatible con instalaciones residenciales estándar.

en.name: 50L Tank Water Heater
en.description: 50-liter storage water heater with magnesium anode and safety valve. Compatible with standard residential installations.

name: Microondas 25L Inverter
description: Microondas de 25 litros con tecnología Inverter, grill combinado y menús automáticos para cocción uniforme.

en.name: 25L Inverter Microwave
en.description: 25-liter microwave with Inverter technology, combination grill, and automatic menus for even cooking.

name: Lavadora Carga Frontal 18 kg
shortDescription: Motor inverter direct drive y ciclos eco.
description: Lavadora de carga frontal de 18 kg con tambor de acero inoxidable, múltiples programas y tecnología de bajo consumo de agua.

en.name: 18 kg Front-Load Washer
en.shortDescription: Direct drive inverter motor and eco cycles.
en.description: 18 kg front-load washer with stainless steel drum, multiple programs, and low water consumption technology.

name: Air Fryer 4 Litros
shortDescription: Cocción crujiente con hasta 80% menos aceite.
description: Freidora de aire de 4 litros con control digital, 8 programas preestablecidos y canasta antiadherente apta para lavavajillas.

en.name: 4-Liter Air Fryer
en.shortDescription: Crispy cooking with up to 80% less oil.
en.description: 4-liter air fryer with digital control, 8 preset programs, and dishwasher-safe non-stick basket.

name: Dispensador de Agua 3 Vías
shortDescription: Agua fría, caliente y ambiente con gabinete inferior.
description: Dispensador de mesa con tres temperaturas, sistema de filtración compatible y diseño compacto para oficina u hogar.

en.name: 3-Temperature Water Dispenser
en.shortDescription: Cold, hot, and room-temperature water with lower cabinet.
en.description: Countertop dispenser with three temperature settings, compatible filtration system, and compact design for office or home.

name: Fabricador de Hielo 15 kg/día
description: Fabricador de hielo independiente con producción de hasta 15 kg diarios, depósito extraíble y alerta de llenado.

en.name: Ice Maker 15 kg/day
en.shortDescription: Continuous production of clear ice cubes.
en.description: Freestanding ice maker with production of up to 15 kg per day, removable bin, and full-bin alert.
